(1) This device is an Allen-Bradley Micro820 Programmable Logic Controller (PLC). It's used to control and automate industrial processes.

(2) The most probable fault cause is battery failure, as the last replacement was 2 years ago, which is beyond the typical battery life.

(3) The tech should check the battery status and replace it if necessary. If the battery is fine, ensure the PLC is powered and functioning correctly.
